allow: Bash(find /usr /opt /Applications -name "npm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3 ; find "$HOME/Library" -name "npm" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -3)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|import Button from "frappe-ui/src/components/Button/Button.vue"|import { Button } from "frappe-ui"|g' src/components/BlockWrapper.vue src/pages/BuilderPage.vue)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|import TextInput from "frappe-ui/src/components/TextInput/TextInput.vue"|import { TextInput } from "frappe-ui"|g' src/components/blocks/image_text.vue src/components/blocks/button.vue src/pages/BuilderPage.vue)

Bash(sed -i '' 's|import FormControl from "frappe-ui/src/components/FormControl/FormControl.vue"|import { FormControl } from "frappe-ui"|g' src/components/blocks/divider.vue src/components/blocks/image_text.vue src/components/blocks/button.vue src/components/blocks/text.vue)
